questions.questionText: Regarding gallbladder cancer, which of the following statements is **WRONG**?

options.text: Gallbladder carcinoma is a relatively uncommon malignancy with poor prognosis when diagnosed at an advanced stage, and the most common pathology is squamous cell carcinoma.

At MRI, gallbladder carcinoma may manifest as an enhancing solid or necrotic mass within or replacing the gallbladder lumen, focal or diffuse asymmetric gallbladder wall thickening, or an intraluminal polypoid lesion.
When symmetric wall thickening is observed, findings may favor a benign cause such as acute or chronic cholecystitis or adenomyomatosis.
The N category is determined by the number of metastatic lymph nodes; N1 is one to three lymph node metastases and N2 is four or more lymph node metastases.
Lymph nodes are considered suspicious when pathologically enlarged according to size criteria (>10 mm in the short axis) or showing abnormal intrinsic signal intensity or morphology at MRI.

questions.questionText: Which description about follicular bronchiolitis below is **wrong**?

options.text: Follicular bronchiolitis is an entity characterized by the development of lymphoid follicles with germinal centers in the walls of small airways, a benign lymphoproliferative small airway disease

Cardinal HRCT features of follicular bronchiolitis includes unilateral centrilobular 1-3 mm nodules, unilateral ground-glass opacities, fluffy tree-in-bud opacities, bronchial dilatation and with evidence of extensive interstitial involvement.
Connective tissue disease can be associated with follicular bronchiolitis
Human immunodeficiency virus infection can be associated with follicular bronchiolitis

questions.explanation:
分布：diffuse, 或peribronchovascular(較少)


### Diffuse Panbronchiolitis
- Rare form of cellular bronchiolitis。常見於東亞中年人。可能和慢性鼻竇炎有關
- CT: nonspecific. Centrilobular nodules, tree-in-bud opacities, bronchiolectasis, mosaic attenuation and/or air trapping. 所有lobe都會看到。
### Constrictive Bronchiolitis
### Organizing Bronchiolitis
![ADD BOOP](data/images/obsidian/add-boop-b533b06b.png)
- OP(Organizing pneumonia): alveolar ducts and alveolar spaces有鬆散結締組織的增生(proliferation of loose connective tissue)
	- 典型的small airway disease的mosaic attenuation, air trapping, centrilobular nodules通常不會有
	- 最常見的表現是：bilateral multifocal airspace opacities, 通常在peripheral/peribronchial distribution
	- 也可能會有perilobular pattern (可看出secondary lobule的樣子)，opacities with reversed halo sign (or atoll sign)代表GGO周圍有consolidation; 還有各種大小的 peribronchovascular nodules
- 可能是不明原因(idiopathic, 稱作cryptogenic OP)或有明確原因(infection最多, 其他還有autoimmune disease, inhalation injury, hypersensitivity pneumonitis, radiation therapy, and aspiration)，有已知原因就叫OP。
- BOOP(bronchiolitis obliterans with organizing pneumonia) ，現在建議用COP(cryptogenic organizing pneumonia)來稱呼。
	- 病理上，有問題的地方在alveolar ducts and alveolar spaces，不影響bronchiole，非Bronchiolitis


---
Crack the core p.423

- small airway inflammation
	- infection(viral, kids), inflammatory(RB-ILD in smoker), asthma(kids)
	- Air trapping: mosaic pattern.
	- Tree-in-bud: nonspecific. usually associated with centrilobular nodules.

|              |                                        |
| ------------ | -------------------------------------- |
| Infection    | Tree-in-bud                            |
| RB-ILD       | Smokers. Centrilobular GGN, upper lobe |
| Subacute HP  | Centrilobular GGN                      |
| Follicular   | RA, Sjogrens, centrilobular GGN        |
| Constrictive | DIPNECH. Air-trapping                  |
|              |                                        |

- Follicular bronchiolitis: inflammatory process in RA, Sjogren's. Related to lymphoid hyperplasia.
	- Centrilobular GGN, scattered bronchial dilation
- Constrictive bronchiolitis: inflammatory process, in viral illness, transplant, drug, inhalation...
	- DIPNECH
	- secondary to mononuclear cells, form granulation tissue, plug airway
	- Airtrapping, cause of Swyer-James hyperlucent lung
- Aspiration pneumonia

[[Fundamentals of High-resolution Lung CT]] Chp. 6 p. 93
HRCT patterns of small airway disease

| HRCT patterns               | Pathophysiology                          | Common diseases                                                               |
| --------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Centrilobular GGN           | Peribronchiolar inflammation/fibrosis    | HP, respiratory, follicular bronchiolitis, atypical pneumonia, pneumoconioses |
| Centrilobular nodules       | Bronchiolar impaction, spread to alveoli | Infection, tumor, aspiration                                                  |
| Mosaic pattern/air-trapping | Bronchiolar Mucoid impaction             | Infection, aspiration                                                         |
| Tree-in-bud                 | Bronchiolar narrowing/occlusion          | Asthma, HP, constrictive bronchiolitis                                        |

- 病理的small airway disease分兩種
	- cellular bronchiolitis: inflammation(+)
	- constrictive bronchiolitis: fibrotic obliteration of bronchioles.

Elastic modulus 數值大，代表物體柔軟，於壓力或剪力下容易形變。Elastic modulus數值小，代表物體剛硬，於壓力或剪力下不易形變。

Young’s modulus E 和 shear modulus G 在待測物不可壓縮的前提之下，兩者關聯是E = 3G。可藉由 shear modulus 推測 Young’s modulus 。

questions.questionText: 以下關於spinal cord arterial anatomy何者**正確**？

options.text: Anterior spinal artery供應central part of cord以及約3/2 dorsal part of cord。因為在這些區域經過的corticospinal tract 以及spinothalamic tract是動作以及感覺主要的神經束，所以infarction時病人會出現患處以下癱瘓以及感覺喪失等症狀。
Posterior spinal artery(PSA)走在spinal cord的後方兩側，因為其具有對稱性，較常見一隻PSA 供應單側cord或是供應區域較小, 因此相對於於anterior spinal artery，PSA直徑較小,數量也比較多.
在胚胎時期，每一節intersegmental artery都有供應cord的medullary artery。隨著發育，會在cord表面remodeling形成相互交通的動脈網路。之後大部分節會hypoplasic change, 我們較熟知的artery of adamkeiwicz即是留下來唯一一支未退化主要供應cord的血管
Spinal dural arteriovenous fistula 是由medullary artery直接連接到dura上的vein形成的，所以栓塞具有一定的cord infarction風險

questions.explanation:
正確
(A)=> 3/2 ventral part of cord
(C)留下來的血管數量很多、光會供應anterior spinal artery的medullary artery就至少約5-7條，包含AKA, artery of von Haller, vertebral artery的分支等
(D)是由epidural 或dural artery supply的，不是medullary artery

questions.questionText: 以下有關於Spinal cord infarction的選項，何者**正確**

options.text: 在胸腹部spinal artery由intercostal artery下游的radiculomedullary artery分支出來，因此栓塞胸壁或腹壁血管時，也可能會塞到spinal artery。其中一條特化的intercostal artery 為intercostobronchial trunk(ICBT)，會分支出right bronchial artery，所以栓塞時需要特別注意Medullary artery也有可能由bronchial artery分支出來。
由aortic dissection或者是TEVAR導致spinal cord infarction時，由於vertebral body主要的supplier也是由spinal artery的分支supply，所以同時也可能在MRI上看見相對應節的marrow edema。
進行Facet joint injection/ spinal root block 時，spinal cord infarction是其中一項可怕的併發症。導致的主要原因是particulate steroid或空氣因為注射的壓力，而逆流至intersegmental artery,導致流入下游的spinal artery造成cord embolization。
Endovascular aortic repair可能會蓋住多節intercostal artery 的開口。若是阻斷供應von Haller或artery of Adamkiewicz的intercostal artery, 此時僅剩下由spinal cord表面的pial collateral供應被阻斷的segments，稍有不甚則會導致cord infarction

questions.explanation:
正確
(A)ICBT分支出bronchial artery，血管走向縱膈腔，不會分支出anterior spinal artery。 可能分支出anterior spinal artery的位置是ICBT的intercostal分支走到foramen的位置。
(B)vertebral body主要的supplier是由intersegmental artery以及epidural artery的分支supply，不是spinal artery.
(D)Endovascular aortic repair是很常使用的技術，spinal cord infarction的機會事實上不高，因為蓋住開口時，會透過intercostal artery以及epidural artery垂直的collateral互相連結。僅透過pial collateral事實上大小不夠。
